field_package_submission_repair_work_ord.field_boundary: This work order converts blocking preflight and patch-plan facts into operator repair tasks only. It does not synthesize field rows, does not validate field performance, and does not authorize actuator or release-gate writeback.

field_package_submission_readiness.field_boundary: Submission readiness only prioritizes field package repair and routing. It does not create field evidence, does not upgrade claims, and cannot authorize actuator or release-gate writeback.

operator_instructions: Replace every TODO value before submission.
Use submitted/submitted_for_r7_preflight only when real field metadata, CSV rows, or review records have been supplied.
Use blocked_with_reason when the item cannot be repaired yet; blocked rows do not route to R7 preflight.
This response does not create field evidence; R7/Agent44 preflight must still inspect the package directory.
field_package_submission_repair_response.field_boundary: This template is an operator response scaffold. It is template-only until all TODO/template markers are removed and it still cannot authorize actuator or release-gate writeback.

Repair response preflight only checks operator response completeness. Even when it is ready, R7/Agent44 must still inspect the real package rows before any field evidence, actuator policy or release-gate claim can be created.

R4 guardrail 水力延迟与池容执行验证

node_modality_sensor_timeseries.minimum_evidence: same-batch inlet/outlet signal pairs with calibration status

site_topology_or_bed_geometry.minimum_evidence: bed geometry and flow records to normalize reaction rate residuals

campaign_operation_log.minimum_evidence: time-aligned regeneration events before/after proxy response

offline_lab_results.minimum_evidence: QA-passed catalyst activity or regeneration response labels

field_proxy_holdout_audit.matched_batch_requirement: At least three batch_id values must have all Agent51 catalyst proxy sensor signals, QA-passed catalyst_activity lab labels and parseable regeneration_event operation rows.
field_proxy_holdout_audit.field_boundary: R7j only validates that the field package can support Agent51 catalyst proxy holdout. It does not make the catalyst proxy field-supported or relax Agent49 catalyst uncertainty by itself.

operation_action_quality.quality_note: Valid operation rows require executable action_id, parseable command/effect/start/end times and release_policy. Optional engineering fields are range-checked when provided.

lab_result_quality.quality_note: Valid offline lab results require parseable sample/result times, non-negative numeric value, non-empty analyte and a passing QA flag. Claim-specific method/unit/detection_limit are audited separately.

proxy_label_quality.quality_note: Valid fast-proxy labels require parseable protective_triggered, field_label_matrix_shock, false_positive_cost_index, event_time_min and lab_label_time_min. Timestamp order is audited separately.

pressure_headloss_quality.quality_note: Valid pressure/headloss events require same-batch bed_id, parseable non-negative pressure/headloss signals, positive flow, parseable matched lab sample time and hydraulic/regeneration labels.

minimum_replay_contract_audit.batch_linkage_requirement: At least three batch_id values should appear across sensor_timeseries, offline_lab_results, campaign_operation_log, fast_proxy_event_log and pressure_headloss_event_log for an Agent42 smoke replay.
minimum_replay_contract_audit.valid_matched_batch_requirement: At least three common batch_id values should also have QA-passed offline lab results and valid operation actions, field-labeled fast-proxy events and valid pressure/headloss events on the same batch_id.
time_order_constraints: campaign_operation_log: command_time_min <= effect_time_min <= end_min and start_min <= end_min
minimum_replay_contract_audit.calibration_note: Three matched batches are a smoke-test floor; field calibration should target at least 12 proxy events before protective control tuning.

agent51_field_proxy_holdout_summary.package_dir: /Users/chuchenqidawang/Documents/低成本传感循环式水处理智能闭环项目/outputs/field_replay_import/real_field_package_template
agent51_field_proxy_holdout_summary.pressure_source_priority_policy: Use node_modality_sensor_timeseries pressure_drop_kPa when available, fill missing pressure from pressure_headloss_event_log, and block scoreability when both sources conflict beyond tolerance.
agent51_field_proxy_holdout_summary.boundary: This summary only turns an R7j-ready package into Agent51 validation rows. It does not prove field-supported control, write actuators or write release gates.

import_report.summary: 现场 replay 导入门：field_replay_import_metadata_blocked；表验收 0/5，可进入 timestamped replay False。
recommendations: 不要把当前 replay 包传给 G6/P6；先补齐 metadata provenance、CSV 必需字段、类型转换和 batch 关联。
synthetic/sample 包只能用于接口联调，不得作为现场快代理 precision/recall 证据。
真实导入包至少应包含 data_origin=field、site_id、campaign_id、operator_id、instrument_snapshot_id 和 chain_of_custody_id。
若使用 pressure/headloss 作为水力代理，必须提供 pressure_headloss_event_log.csv，并确保每个 pressure batch 有同 batch 离线标签锚点。

method_contract.reality_mapping: 把真实现场 replay 包从“几张 CSV”提升为可追溯、可类型验收、可 batch 回连的数据入口，防止 synthetic/sample 数据误入现场校准。
data_needs: node_modality_sensor_timeseries.csv for Agent51 catalyst proxy holdout
site_topology_or_bed_geometry.csv for Agent51 catalyst proxy holdout
pressure/headloss batch labels and bed_id linkage
method_contract.failure_boundary: 导入通过只代表现场 replay 包可进入 Agent42；不能替代 Agent42 replay 指标、Agent43 G6/P6 或真实污染物达标验证。

sensor_timeseries.description: 低成本传感原始时间序列，支撑快代理触发时间。

offline_lab_results.description: 离线标签与结果返回时间，用于计算检测 turnaround 和快代理标签。

campaign_operation_log.description: 控制动作命令、执行和生效时间，用于计算执行器/预处理延迟。

pressure_headloss_event_log.description: 压降/水头损失候选代理事件，用于 replay 催化剂床堵塞、水力异常和 guardrail 阻断边界。

fast_proxy_event_log.description: 基质冲击快代理事件与现场标签，用于 precision/recall、提前量和误触发成本校准。

r7j_catalyst_proxy_holdout_template.field_boundary: Optional for Agent44 import; required by R7j when Agent51 weak_axis_repair_plan is evaluated.

metadata.notes: Replace every TODO value before running Agent44 as real field evidence.

export_policy.writeback_boundary: Agent44 只负责导入验收；保护性控制写回必须继续通过 Agent42 replay 和 Agent43 G6/P6。

field_replay_evidence_chain_report.summary: 现场 replay 证据链：field_replay_evidence_chain_blocked_at_import；导入通过 False，G6 保护性候选 False。
recommendations: 先补真实 metadata.json 与四张 replay CSV，并通过 Agent44；不要单独运行 Agent42/Agent43 来绕过导入门。
synthetic/sample 包只能作为接口联调，不能产生任何现场保护性写回候选。

method_contract.reality_mapping: 把 Agent44 导入门、Agent42 时间戳回放和 Agent43 G6/P6 变成不可绕过的现场校准证据链，只有完整链条通过才形成保护性控制写回候选。
method_contract.failure_boundary: 证据链通过也只形成保护性控制候选，不能自动写入现场 PLC/SCADA，不能替代 release gate、污染物达标或 field conformal calibration。

borrowed_from: soft sensor field holdout release gate
method_contract.reality_mapping: 把真实 sensor/lab/operation/catalyst 数据包导入、timestamped replay、G6/P6 保护性控制门、软传感 field holdout 和 claim-specific 采集包验收合成一个 R7 总门。
data_needs: claim-specific holdout labels and chain-of-custody metadata
method_contract.failure_boundary: R7 can produce acceptance status and human-review candidates only. It must not treat synthetic templates as field replay, must not bypass offline lab confirmation, and must not auto-write actuator or release-gate policy.

minimum_gate_sequence: Agent52 multi-facility replay promotion gate with Agent51 catalyst proxy holdout
human review before any release-gate calibration writeback

acceptance_matrix.title: 真实 field package 导入与 provenance
G6/P6 replay gate 与保护性控制候选
Agent44 -> Agent42 -> Agent43 -> Agent45 证据链
Agent49/52 多设施控制晋级与催化剂代理验证门
软传感 field holdout release calibration gate
claim-specific 字段、source_basis 与真实 field rows
统一 evidence gate 的 field-supported 升级判断

writeback_policy.policy_effect: R7 can route real-field acceptance evidence to human review; it cannot auto-authorize control or discharge.

next_refactor_action.title: 导入 data_origin=field 的真实 metadata 与 CSV 包
next_refactor_action.must_not_do: 不能把 synthetic/sample 包当成真实现场 replay；不能绕过人工复核写执行器或 release gate。
